recommendations.title: Lo más sencillo es complicarlo todo
recommendations.overview: When a 17-year-old learns the TV news host she pines for is engaged, she and her best friend launch an elaborate plan to prevent his marriage.

recommendations.title: Tall Girl 2
recommendations.overview: After Jodi Kreyman gains popularity, her miscommunications start causing rifts with those around her and now she really needs to "stand tall".

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character 2

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: Bingo: The King of the Mornings

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: Welcome Home Roscoe Jenkins
recommendations.overview: When a celebrated TV show host returns to his hometown in the South, his family is there to remind him that going home is no vacation!

recommendations.title: Father and Daughter
recommendations.overview: A father says goodbye to his young daughter. In time the daughter grows old, but within her there is always a deep longing for her father.

recommendations.title: Money Monster
recommendations.overview: Financial TV host Lee Gates and his producer Patty are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor takes over their studio.
